method_atom: a necessary-and-sufficient extremality criterion for the vertices (extreme points) of a convex set of positive-semidefinite operators that is carved out by imposing an additional positivity constraint under a linear partitioning transformation, together with a constructive algorithm that enumerates such extreme points in finite dimension.
object_atom: finite-dimensional density matrices of a composite quantum system that are required to have a positive partial transpose with respect to one subsystem.
brief_reason: the convex-geometry extremality criterion and vertex-finding algorithm for a positivity-constrained operator set are transferable machinery, while the density matrices with positive partial transpose of a bipartite quantum system are the physics-specific object.
